item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-nodejs May 18th, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Videos

  • Google I/O 2009 - V8: High Performance JavaScript Engine - The basics of V8 architecture and how it optimizes JavaScript execution.
  • Google I/O 2012 - Breaking the JavaScript Speed Limit with V8 - How V8 optimizes JavaScript execution.
  • Google I/O 2013 - Accelerating Oz with V8: Follow the Yellow Brick Road to JavaScript Performance - How to detect app bottlenecks and optimize performance with V8 knowledge.
  • Node.js Internal Architecture | Ignition, Turbofan, Libuv - How Node.js works internally, with a focus on V8 and libuv.
  • Introduction to libuv: What's a Unicorn Velociraptor? - libuv architecture, thread pool, and event loop, with its source code.
  • libuv Cross platform asynchronous i/o - libuv architecture in detail, such as where it's actually using threads.
  • You Don't Know Node - ForwardJS San Francisco - Explaining Node.js internals with quizzes about V8, libuv, event loop, module, stream, and cluster.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-nodejs May 15th, 2018
item.description:
Packages

Mad science

  • BitcoinJSstars4.2k - Clean, readable, proven Bitcoin library.
  • Bitcorestars4k - Pure and powerful Bitcoin library.
  • PDFKitstars7.2k - PDF generation library.
  • NodeOSstars6.4k - The first operating system powered by npm.
  • Cytoscape.jsstars7.6k - Graph theory (a.k.a. network) modeling and analysis.
  • isomorphic-gitstars5.7k - Pure JavaScript implementation of Git.

    • Packages

    Command-line apps

  • gh-homestars166 - Open the GitHub page of the repo in the current directory.
  • npm-homestars173 - Open the npm page of a package.
  • trashstars2.1k - Safer alternative to rm.

    • Packages

    Functional programming

  • Ramdastars20.7k - Utility library with a focus on flexible functional composition enabled by automatic currying and reversed argument order. Avoids mutating data.
  • Moutstars1.2k - Utility library with the biggest difference between other existing solutions is that you can choose to load only the modules/functions that you need, no extra overhead.

    • Packages

    Command-line utilities

  • yargsstars8.8k - Command-line parser that automatically generates an elegant user-interface.
  • get-stdinstars291 - Easier stdin.
  • Inkstars16.2k - React for interactive command-line apps.
  • terminal-linkstars420 - Create clickable links in the terminal.
  • terminal-imagestars808 - Display images in the terminal.
  • Inquirer.jsstars14.3k - Interactive command-line prompt.
  • update-notifierstars1.5k - Update notifications for your CLI app.
  • sudo-blockstars85 - Block users from running your app with root permissions.
  • term-sizestars116 - Reliably get the terminal window size.

    • Packages

    Build tools

  • parcelstars38.1k - Blazing fast, zero config web app bundler.
  • Startstars478 - Functional task runner with shareable presets.

    • Packages

    Web frameworks

  • ThinkJSstars5.2k - Framework with ES2015+ support, WebSockets, REST API.
  • ActionHerostars2.2k - Framework for making reusable & scalable APIs for TCP sockets, WebSockets, and HTTP clients.
  • Next.jsstars66.8k - Minimalistic framework for server-rendered universal JavaScript web apps.
  • Nuxt.jsstars36k - Minimalistic framework for server-rendered Vue.js apps.

    • Packages

    Documentation

  • documentation.jsstars5.3k - API documentation generator with support for ES2015+ and flow annotation.
  • ESDocstars2.7k - Documentation generator targeting ES2015, attaching test code and measuring documentation coverage.

    • Packages

    Real-time

  • Socket.iostars53.3k - Enables real-time bidirectional event-based communication.
  • Fayestars4.3k - Real-time client-server message bus, based on Bayeux protocol.
  • deepstream.iostars274 - Scalable real-time microservice framework.

    • Packages

    Date

  • Luxonstars11.1k - Library for working with dates and times.

    • Packages

    Parsing

  • Jisonstars3.9k - Friendly JavaScript parser generator. It shares genes with Bison, Yacc and family.

    • Packages

    Testing

  • WebdriverIOstars6.7k - Automated testing based on the WebDriver protocol.

    • Packages

    Benchmarking

  • Benchmark.jsstars4.9k - Benchmarking library that supports high-resolution timers and returns statistically significant results.

    • Packages

    Minifiers

  • UglifyJS2stars11.4k - JavaScript minifier.

    • Packages

    Authentication

  • Passportstars18.8k - Simple, unobtrusive authentication.

    • Packages

    Process management

  • Phusion Passengerstars4.7k - Friendly process manager that integrates directly into Nginx.

    • Packages

    Static site generators

  • Wintersmithstars3.5k - Flexible, minimalistic, multi-platform static site generator.
  • Assemblestars3.9k - Static site generator for Node.js, Grunt.js, and Yeoman.
  • Phenomicstars3.3k - Modern static website generator based on the React and Webpack ecosystem.
  • docsifystars17.4k - Markdown documentation site generator with no statically built HTML files.

    • Packages

    Content management systems

  • ApostropheCMSstars3.5k - Content management system with an emphasis on intuitive front end content editing and administration built on Express and MongoDB.
  • Strapistars36.4k - Content Management Framework (headless-CMS) to build powerful APIs.

    • Packages

    Forum

  • nodeBBstars11.9k - Forum platform for the modern web.

    • Packages

    Blogging

  • Ghoststars37.4k - Simple, powerful publishing platform.
  • Hexostars32.7k - Fast, simple and powerful blogging framework.

    • Packages

    Miscellaneous

  • owstars3.1k - Function argument validation for humans.
  • semverstars3.6k - Semantic version parser.
  • @sindresorhus/isstars1.1k - Type check values.
